# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent envoy admin interface exposed.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901
  static_resources:
    listeners:
    - name: admin
      address:
        socket_address:
          protocol: TCP
          address: 127.0.0.1
          port_value: 9901
      filter_chains:
      - filters:
        - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
          typed_config:
            '@@': 'envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager'
            stat_prefix: admin
            route_config:
              name: local_route
              virtual_hosts:
              - name: local_service
                domains:
                - '*'
                routes:
                - match:
                    prefix: '/stats'
                  route:
                    cluster_name: envoy_stats
                - match:
                    prefix: '/healthcheck'
                  route:
                    cluster_name: envoy_healthcheck
            http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              typed_config:
                '@@': 'envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v2.Router'
        - name: envoy.stats_saver
          typed_config:
            '@@': 'envoy.extensions.filters.network.stats_saver.v2.StatsSaver'
            stat_prefix: admin
            stats_path: /stats
            access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log

  cluster_manager:
    clusters:
      - name: envoy_stats
        type: static
        hosts:
          - socket_address:
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 9901
      - name: envoy_healthcheck
        type: static
        hosts:
          - socket_address:
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 9901

  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/access.log
